calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Ms. Sapiane, that no Inventory & Appraisal or Petition for Final Distribution has been filed, that there was a failure to appear in July and August, that an Order to Appear was issued for today regarding removal and sanctions and that the Court will remove Ms. Sapiane and close the estate.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Off Calendar

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Sep-26-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court stated that there is no appearance by Ms. Sapiane who is in Propria Persona, that no Inventory & Appraisal, Petition for Final Distribution or Approval of Status Report has been filed, that an Order to Appear was issued for this date on July 16, 2016 and that it will issue an Order to Show Cause re Removal and for sanctions. the status of filing an inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution and the Order to Appear were continued to September 26, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul Alvarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Aug-29-2016 Continued To Sep-26-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Inventory And Appraisal; Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jul-27-2016 Continued To Aug-29-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Administrator Krissy Sapiane to appear on August 29, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the inventory & appraisal and petition for final distribution has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
